title: humata angustata
intro: Humata angustata, also known as the Narrow-leaved Water Fern, is a species of aquatic plant belonging to the family Marsileaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The plant has been shown to possess various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress, improve wound healing, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Humata angustata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
